# HiHired - AI Resume Builder
> The fastest way to build, tailor, and auto-fill job applications with AI

## What HiHired Does
HiHired is a free AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create ATS-optimized resumes, generate tailored cover letters, and auto-fill job applications on Greenhouse, Workday, LinkedIn, and 100+ other platforms.

## Key Features
- AI resume builder with 9 ATS-safe templates
- Job description matching and keyword optimization
- AI cover letter generation
- Chrome extension for auto-filling job applications (Greenhouse, Workday, Lever, LinkedIn Easy Apply)
- Resume ATS score checker

## Use Cases
- Building a resume from scratch in under 5 minutes
- Tailoring an existing resume to a specific job description
- Auto-filling repetitive job application forms
- Generating cover letters matched to job descriptions

## Pricing
Free to use. Premium plans available for unlimited AI generations.

## Links
- Main site: https://hihired.org
- Resume builder: https://hihired.org/builder
- Chrome extension: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/hihired
- Help: https://hihired.org/help
